name: Tirathai Public Company Limited
summary: Tirathai Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, repairs, sells, and maintains transformer equipment in Thailand and internationally. The company offers power transformers for manufacturers and suppliers of electrical energy. It also provides various distribution transformers comprising freely breathing system, completely filled, gas cushion, inert gas pressure system, loop feed or radial feed, and power unit load center transformers. In addition, the company offers special transformers, such as rectifier transformers, which are used in chemical industrial factories; induction furnace transformers that are used in metals smelting industry; and transformers using other insulators, such as silicone oil, etc. Further, it provides transformer tank body and accessories, including covers, fins, clamps, etc.; and distributes, installs, and maintains electrical power equipment. Additionally, the company offers transformer erection and installation, oil filling, maintenance, modification and repair, testing, and equipment rental services; and custom metalwork services. Tirathai Public Company Limited was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Samut Prakan, Thailand.
